overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a wooden industrial dock. The setting features paddle steamers, cargo wagons, industrial warehouses, and smokestacks under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway alongside warehouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered wooden dock walkway, passing by NPCs resting against the warehouse wall

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground against the warehouse wall
standing and leaning against the wooden wall

entered.detail: wooden roof structure covering the dock walkway
large white riverboat with red trim and twin smokestacks
vertical wooden plank wall with large barn-style doors
thick wooden pillars supporting the dock roof
wooden railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden dock walkway, sheltered by a wooden roof structure. To the left, a paddle steamer is docked on the water, while to the right, a wooden warehouse wall features NPCs resting against it. The atmosphere is industrial and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial dock with cargo wagons and industrial backdrop

events.description: exits covered walkway into open dock area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the open dock area past parked cargo wagons and industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: walking past the character carrying a wooden crate

entered.detail: large industrial building with green steel framework and glass panels
tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke
wooden freight wagons with large red wheels
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires
large stone building with classical columns and multiple smokestacks

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open industrial dock area. The scene reveals a large green steel industrial building, factory smokestacks, and cargo wagons with red wheels. A large columned customs house becomes visible in the distance as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock area approaching customs house with cargo ship coming into view

events.description: character turns left toward the large cargo ship docked at the pier

agents.ego_description: approaching the customs house then turning left toward the docked steamship while navigating around cargo

notable_agents.action: laborer walking past carrying a wooden crate on his shoulder

entered.detail: large grey steamship with multiple masts and red funnel docked at the pier
stacks of wooden barrels and sacks

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the dock area, passing wooden barrels and cargo stacks while approaching the columned customs house. Around 35 seconds, the character turns left toward a large grey cargo steamship docked at the pier, revealing more of the industrial harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo ship dock with industrial cranes and lumber stacks

events.description: character stops walking, looks around at the ship, then turns around to face back toward the dock

agents.ego_description: walking around the ship dock area, stopping to observe the surroundings, then turning back toward the industrial buildings

entered.detail: wooden dock crane structure for loading cargo

segments.scene_description: The character explores the area near the large cargo ship, passing stacks of wooden crates and lumber. A wooden dock crane is visible overhead. The character stops to look around, observing the ship and dock, then turns back toward the industrial buildings as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered industrial walkway that gradually opens into a sprawling, overcast harbor. It begins under a wooden roof structure, moving past a docked paddle steamer and NPCs resting against a warehouse wall. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene expands to reveal a large green steel building, factory smokestacks, and cargo wagons with red wheels, while a columned customs house appears in the distance. The camera then pushes forward past wooden barrels and cargo stacks before turning left toward a massive grey cargo steamship docked at the pier. Finally, the view explores the area around the ship, passing under a wooden dock crane and through stacks of lumber before turning back toward the industrial buildings.
